name: Hospital Discharge
process_description: The patient discharge process starts when the attending physician decides the patient is ready for discharge. A ward nurse prepares the discharge checklist and medication summary. The pharmacy validates and dispenses discharge medication. The billing office prepares the final bill. A discharge coordinator explains aftercare instructions to the patient and schedules follow-up appointments. The process ends when the patient leaves the hospital.
simulation_goal: Reduce patient discharge delays while keeping medication handover accuracy and follow-up scheduling completeness at high levels
